generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance AirQualityCarbonDioxideSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-equipped CO₂ sensor for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityParticulateMatterSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-equipped particulate matter sensor for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-equipped temperature sensor for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-equipped humidity sensor for real-time indoor air quality monitoring in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder sensor measuring the gantry crane's position for real-time trajectory validation in the lab-scale gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneLoadCell : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Load cell sensor measuring payload weight for real-time operational monitoring in the lab-scale gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneMotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor monitoring motor performance for real-time control validation in the lab-scale gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneEncoderVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Velocity sensor derived from encoder readings for real-time motion analysis in the lab-scale gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityCarbonDioxideSensor, AirQualityParticulateMatterSensor,
                         AirQualityTemperatureSensor, AirQualityHumiditySensor
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder, CraneLoadCell, CraneMotorCurrentSensor,
                         CraneEncoderVelocitySensor
]

instance ControllerTelemetryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneMotorCurrentSensor, CraneEncoderVelocitySensor
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionMetricsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionEncoder, CraneEncoderVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AutomationMLAirQualityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for structured representation of physical and logical components in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, MicrosoftAzureCloudEnabler
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral adaptation model for both physical greenhouse and its digital twin, embedded with prerecorded data in virtual machine images."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical representation of the gantry crane's motion and dynamics for simulation and validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBHistoricalDataEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance CraneControlSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Custom simulation model for crane dynamics and control strategies, supporting real-time and offline validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBHistoricalDataEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance AirQualityTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data collected from Raspberry Pi sensors for indoor air quality metrics (CO₂, particulate matter, temperature, humidity)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualitySensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler, MicrosoftAzureCloudEnabler
]

instance CraneOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical operational data including position, velocity, acceleration, load, and energy consumption metrics."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted, ControllerTelemetryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBHistoricalDataEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionMetrics : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory data including timestamps, waypoints, and residual motion measurements for continuous validation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryExecutionMetricsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBHistoricalDataEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance InfluxDBTimeSeriesEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database for time-series data storage in both GreenhouseDT and Air Quality Management exemplars."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualityPredictionService,
                   GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance ActiveMQMessageBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker facilitating real-time data exchange between physical and digital components in GreenhouseDT."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService
]

instance MicrosoftAzureCloudEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for cloud-based digital twin pipeline execution in the Air Quality Management exemplar."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityVisualizationService, AirQualitySimulationService,
                   AirQualityPredictionService
]

instance TimescaleDBHistoricalDataEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database optimized for time-series data storage of crane operational metrics and trajectory execution."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService,
                   FaultDetectionService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for high-frequency inter-service signaling and real-time data transmission in the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService,
                   OptimalControlService
]

instance PythonControllerInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based interface facilitating real-time data transmission from physical crane to digital twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

// C6: Services
instance AirQualityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime visualization of indoor air quality metrics using AutomationML models and Azure tools."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance AirQualitySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of environmental conditions (e.g., virus spread prevention) using AutomationML models."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualitySimulationInsight
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Prediction of air quality trends using time-series data and Azure analytics."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityPredictionInsight
]

instance GreenhouseBehavioralAdaptationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Self-adaptive mechanisms for runtime adjustments to both physical greenhouse and its digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseAdaptationInsight
]

instance CraneDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboards for crane state monitoring including kinematic models and control signals."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time validation comparing digital and physical system states using distance metrics and thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time fault detection for sensor failures and mechanical issues in the gantry crane system."
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory planning and energy-efficient control strategies for the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Long-term storage and retrieval of operational metrics for retrospective analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

    base:desc "Mechanical structure including beams, hooks, and pulleys for the lab-scale gantry crane system."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "
The **virtual-to-physical interaction** in the Digital Twin system is mediated by the **Control Application** and **Trajectory Generator Service**, which translate digital commands into physical actions on the **Physical Crane**. Key aspects include:
- **Command Types**:
  - **Trajectory commands**: Optimal movement paths generated by the **Trajectory Generator Service** (kinematics-based, ensuring zero residual swinging at waypoints).
  - **Configuration commands**: Sent via the **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** to adjust crane parameters (e.g., speed limits, safety thresholds).
  - **Simulation-derived corrections**: Adjustments to trajectories based on **Continuous Validation Service** feedback (e.g., compensating for unmodeled dynamics).
- **Control Message Formats**:
  - Structured data (e.g., JSON or protobuf) for trajectory waypoints (coordinates, timestamps, velocity profiles).
  - Binary or serialized Python objects for low-level controller commands (e.g., PWM signals for motors).
- **Validation and Authentication Mechanisms**:
  - **Threshold-based validation**: The **Continuous Validation Service** compares executed trajectories to simulations; breaches trigger alerts via the **Dashboard**.
  - **Implicit authentication**: Assumed via containerized service isolation (Python applications running in trusted environments) and MQTT topic-based access control.
- **Feedback Systems**:
  - **Closed-loop control**: The **Control Application** receives real-time sensor data from the **Physical Crane Interface** to adjust commands dynamically.
  - **Operator feedback**: Alerts in the **Dashboard** notify of deviations (e.g., trajectory errors exceeding thresholds).
- **Conflict Resolution**:
  - Priority-based: Trajectory commands override manual HMI inputs during automated operations.
  - Fail-safes: The **Control Application** halts motion if sensor data indicates unsafe conditions (e.g., puck detachment).
- **Command Execution Confirmation**:
  - Acknowledgment via **MQTT messages** or database logs (e.g., timestamped records of executed trajectories in TimescaleDB).
  - Visual confirmation in the **Dashboard** (e.g., real-time crane state overlay on simulated trajectories).
"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system exemplars employ a **lightweight, ad-hoc orchestration pattern** without a unified framework. **GreenhouseDT** uses **InfluxDB (time-series database) + ActiveMQ (message broker) + virtual machines**, suggesting a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)** with **loose coupling** between physical (greenhouse) and digital components. **Air Quality Management** leverages **AutomationML-based digital twin modeling** and **Microsoft Azure tools** (unspecified services) for a **pipeline-driven orchestration**, integrating **Raspberry Pi sensor data** via **containerized or virtualized deployment**. The **gantry crane system** (logistics/cyber-physical domain) adopts **C4 Model architecture** (context/container diagrams), implying **modular component integration** but no explicit orchestration framework. **Resource management** is implied via **virtualization/containerization** (e.g., VMs, Raspberry Pi) and **prerecorded data** (GreenhouseDT), while **system-wide coordination** relies on **ad-hoc message passing** (ActiveMQ) or **cloud-native pipelines** (Azure). **No global state management** or **federated twin coordination** is described."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar emphasizes **self-adaptive behavioral models** with **prerecorded data** in virtual machines, implying a focus on **model fidelity through real-time adaptation** of both physical and digital systems. The **Air Quality Management** exemplar employs **runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction** models, suggesting **validation via comparative analysis** between simulated and real-world air quality metrics. **Uncertainty sources** are not explicitly quantified, but the use of **AutomationML** and **Microsoft Azure tools** implies structured model validation pipelines. **Error detection and correction mechanisms** are inferred through the **adaptive feedback loops** in GreenhouseDT and the **Azure-based digital twin pipeline** in Air Quality Management, though no specific algorithms or thresholds are mentioned. **Quality assurance processes** are not detailed beyond the use of **containerization/virtualization** for reproducible deployments and **GitHub-hosted documentation** for transparency."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s technical network infrastructure** relies on a **service-oriented architecture** with the following specifications:
- **Communication Protocols**:
  - **MQTT**: Used for lightweight, publish-subscribe messaging between services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service** → **Control Application**).
  - **Python-based APIs**: Direct inter-process communication (IPC) between containers (e.g., **Physical Crane Interface** ↔ **Control Application**).
  - **TimescaleDB protocol**: Likely PostgreSQL-compatible (TimescaleDB is an extension) for structured data storage and querying.
- **Network Topology and Architecture**:
  - **Containerized microservices**: Each Digital Twin component (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**) runs as an isolated container, communicating via the **MQTT Broker** or direct Python calls.
  - **Centralized database**: **TimescaleDB** acts as a single source of truth for all time-series data.
- **Bandwidth and Latency Requirements**:
  - **Low-latency**: Critical for trajectory validation (e.g., <100ms round-trip for control loops).
  - **Moderate bandwidth**: Assumed sufficient for sensor data (e.g., 10–100Hz updates) and trajectory commands.
- **Reliability and Redundancy Mechanisms**:
  - **Database replication**: TimescaleDB supports high availability (not explicitly detailed but implied for production use).
  - **Service resilience**: Containerized deployment allows for restarts or scaling of failed services (e.g., **MQTT Broker** or **Logging Application**).
- **Security Protocols**:
  - **MQTT over TLS**: Assumed for encrypted broker communication (not explicitly stated but standard practice).
  - **Container isolation**: Services run in separate containers with minimal exposed interfaces.
  - **Database security**: TimescaleDB likely enforces role-based access control (RBAC) for data integrity.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "
The **Digital Twin’s hosting and deployment infrastructure** is designed for **local/edge deployment** with the following technical details:
- **Hosting Platforms**:
  - **On-premise/edge**: The system is tailored for the lab-scale gantry crane environment, implying deployment on local hardware (e.g., a Raspberry Pi cluster or industrial PC) rather than cloud.
  - **Containerization**: All services (e.g., **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**) are deployed as Python applications in isolated containers (likely using Docker or similar).
- **Computational and Storage Requirements**:
  - **CPU**: Moderate requirements for kinematics simulations and real-time trajectory generation (e.g., multi-core for parallel processing of trajectories).
  - **Memory**: Sufficient for running multiple Python services concurrently (e.g., 4–8GB RAM for the entire stack).
  - **Storage**: **TimescaleDB** requires persistent storage for time-series data (e.g., SSD for low-latency writes).
- **Scalability Mechanisms**:
  - **Horizontal scaling**: Additional instances of stateless services (e.g., **Simulation Service**) can be deployed for parallel trajectory simulations.
  - **Database partitioning**: TimescaleDB supports hypertables for automatic data distribution across disks.
- **Deployment Models Supported**:
  - **Monolithic containerization**: All Digital Twin services are co-located with the physical system (no cloud dependency).
  - **Hybrid potential**: Could extend to cloud for analytics (e.g., offloading historical data to AWS/Azure), but not described in the document.
- **Availability/Reliability Assurance**:
  - **High availability**: Implicit via containerized services (e.g., auto-restart on failure) and TimescaleDB’s replication capabilities.
  - **Redundancy**: Critical services (e.g., **MQTT Broker**, **Database**) can be mirrored or clustered (not explicitly detailed but standard practice).
  - **Backup**: TimescaleDB supports periodic snapshots for data recovery.
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin exemplars exhibit **limited horizontal integration** with external systems, relying on **domain-specific, ad-hoc protocols**. **GreenhouseDT** integrates with **InfluxDB (time-series storage)** and **ActiveMQ (message broker)**, but no interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) or enterprise system dependencies are specified. **Air Quality Management** uses **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling and **Microsoft Azure tools** (unspecified APIs/services), suggesting **cloud-based data exchange** but no explicit standard. The **gantry crane system** lacks external integration details beyond its **C4 Model architecture**, which is software-centric. **No mention of integration patterns** (e.g., APIs, microservices, or Digital Twin interoperability frameworks like **DMTF’s Open Digital Twin standards**) is provided. Dependencies are **internal to the exemplar’s tech stack** (e.g., Raspberry Pi sensors, VMs, Azure), with **no cross-system coordination** (e.g., with other Digital Twins or ERP/MES systems)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **Air Quality Management** exemplar adheres to **AutomationML** for digital twin modeling, a standardized format for engineering data exchange. The **GreenhouseDT** exemplar uses **InfluxDB** (time-series database standard) and **ActiveMQ** (JMS-compliant message broker), while the **Gantry Crane** exemplar employs the **C4 Model** (software architecture standard) for system visualization. No explicit **certification requirements** or **interoperability frameworks** (e.g., OPC UA, FIWARE) are mentioned. The **ad-hoc approach** of these exemplars suggests limited adherence to **domain-specific standards** (e.g., ISO 23247 for digital twins), relying instead on **open-source tools** and **GitHub-hosted repositories** for dissemination."
]
